name: @openclaw/openclaw-host-git-push
description: Bounded host-git bridge plugin for host-backed push and PR actions.

scripts.lint: biome check index.ts api.ts openclaw.plugin.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json src skills --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write index.ts api.ts openclaw.plugin.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json src skills --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.pack:smoke: rm -rf .pack && mkdir -p .pack && pnpm pack --pack-destination .pack && tar -tf .pack/*.tgz | grep -E 'package/(dist/index.js|openclaw.plugin.json|skills/openclaw-host-git-push/SKILL.md|skills/openclaw-host-git-pr/SKILL.md|README.md|LICENSE)$'
